original_image_tags: A tan or manila-colored document folder or divider tab, punched with three binder holes along the bottom edge and one hole at the top center. The folder appears blank except for a handwritten case number in the upper right quadrant.

elements.description: Handwritten numbers '62-83894-448' in blue and red ink at the top right, and three punch holes on the page.

judge.reason: Both descriptions consistently identify the same visual elements: a tan document folder/divider, three punch holes on the bottom edge, and handwritten case numbers in the upper right area; the quoted text ('62-83894-448') is consistent with the description of a handwritten case number.
